summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 2 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs:124 — STATE.json assertion is gated by `if (existsSync(statePath))`; if STATE.json is never written the check silently passes. Drop the guard so the "state-based assertion" actually fails loudly.
🟡 test/run-spec-gate.test.mjs:124 — STATE.json assertion wrapped in `if (existsSync(...))` silently no-ops if planner skips persisting state; require existence or move assertion outside conditional.
